forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXHBDW50GFJS4TH0HGS0D3KP
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9280'
+title: 'ACPÔćĺTranscript utility: SessionUpdate stream into a FoundationModels Transcript'
+---
+## What
+Ship the symmetric half of the bridge in this package (spec ┬ž9, ┬ž10 ÔÇö decided 2026-07-14: ship here so AgentViewKit consumes any ACP agent uniformly), in `Sources/FoundationModelsACP/Bridge/`:
+
+- A client-side utility that folds an `AsyncStream<SessionUpdate>` into a growing FoundationModels `Transcript`:
+  - `agent_message_chunk` Ôćĺ `.response` text
+  - `tool_call` / `tool_call_update` Ôćĺ `.toolCalls` / `.toolOutput` (correlated by `toolCallId`)
+  - `agent_thought_chunk`, `plan`, and permission requests Ôćĺ custom `.structure` segments
+- The ACP client thereby becomes just another producer of the same Transcript AgentViewKit already renders ÔÇö the inverse of the ┬ž7 mapping.
+- Round-trip property: a turn mapped FM Ôćĺ ACP (bridge task) and back through this utility reproduces an equivalent Transcript (lossless round-trip, spec ┬ž7).
+- Apply the same straggler policy as the session-update stream task: late `tool_call_update`s still fold in.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Each SessionUpdate variant folds into the documented Transcript entry type
+- [ ] Round-trip test: scripted Transcript Ôćĺ bridge Ôćĺ SessionUpdate stream Ôćĺ this utility Ôćĺ Transcript, equivalent modulo documented lossy fields (none expected)
+- [ ] Late tool_call_update after the turn's final message still updates the corresponding toolOutput
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsACPTests/Bridge/ACPToTranscriptTests.swift` ÔÇö per-variant folding + straggler handling
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsACPTests/Bridge/RoundTripTests.swift` ÔÇö FM Ôćĺ ACP Ôćĺ FM equivalence on golden turns
+- [ ] Run `swift test` ÔÇö exits 0
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` ÔÇö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,4 +1,27 @@
 ---
+comments:
+- actor: wballard
+  id: 01kxksd9kfvqsr2zfsxseh0s8c
+  text: |-
+    Picked up. Implemented the ACPÔćĺTranscript utility as the exact inverse of the prompt-turn task's TranscriptMapper (FMÔćĺACP).
+
+    FM Transcript IS client-constructible (verified against the SDK via the existing BridgeTestSupport helpers + a clean `swift build`): `Transcript(entries:)`, `Transcript.Response(assetIDs:segments:)`, `Transcript.Reasoning(segments:)`, `Transcript.ToolCalls([Transcript.ToolCall(id:toolName:arguments:)])`, `Transcript.ToolOutput(id:toolName:segments:)`, `Transcript.TextSegment(content:)`, `Transcript.StructuredSegment(schemaName:content:)`, `GeneratedContent(json:)`/`.jsonString`. `Transcript` and `Transcript.ToolCalls` are Collections (Array(transcript) / Array(calls) compile). No invented initializers.
+
+    NEW Sources/.../Bridge/TranscriptBuilder.swift ÔÇö public, stateful struct (mirrors TranscriptMapper's shape):
+    - `public mutating func fold(_ SessionUpdate)` + `public var transcript: Transcript` (grows) + `public static func transcript(folding: AsyncStream<SessionUpdate>) async -> Transcript` (drains a stream ÔÇö the AgentViewKit entry point).
+    - Inverse mapping: agent_message_chunk Ôćĺ text segment(s) accumulated into one `.response`; agent_thought_chunk Ôćĺ text segment(s) into one `.reasoning` (FIRST-CLASS reasoning entry, ┬ž10); a role change or any non-chunk update flushes the open group. tool_call Ôćĺ `.toolCalls([ToolCall(id=toolCallId, toolName=title, arguments=GeneratedContent(json: rawInput))])`. tool_call_update Ôćĺ `.toolOutput(id=toolCallId, segments from text content)`. plan Ôćĺ `.response` with a `.structure` segment (schemaName "plan", content = encoded Plan) so the forward mapper re-derives it. user_message_chunk/mode/config/usage/sessionInfo/availableCommands/unknown Ôćĺ skipped (no agent-output entry).
+    - TOOL-NAME RECOVERY (correlation by id): ToolCallUpdate carries no toolName, but ToolOutput requires one. The builder remembers toolName per toolCallId from the preceding tool_call and applies it to the correlated tool_call_update Ôćĺ LOSSLESS on toolName (no orphan default needed for well-formed turns; orphan straggler defaults to "").
+
+    LOSSLESSNESS / documented lossy fields: the ACP update stream is a projection; fields the projection drops (Response.assetIDs, Reasoning.signature/metadata, non-text content blocks, ToolOutput.toolName except via id-correlation) are reconstructed empty. On turns produced by TranscriptMapper those are already empty and toolName is recovered Ôćĺ round trip is lossless (matches the card's "none expected"). Documented in the type doc.
+
+    ROUND-TRIP PROPERTY: equivalence = identical forward projection (the SessionUpdate sequence is exactly what AgentViewKit renders). RoundTripTests: scripted Transcript Ôćĺ TranscriptMapper (the bridge) Ôćĺ [SessionUpdate] Ôćĺ AsyncStream Ôćĺ TranscriptBuilder Ôćĺ Transcript' Ôćĺ TranscriptMapper Ôćĺ assert reprojection == original projection. Golden turns: full text+reasoning+2-tool-call turn, reasoning+response, plan, and a straggler turn (tool output settling AFTER the final message) ÔÇö all lossless. Plus a structural test proving toolName is recovered through the round trip.
+
+    STRAGGLER: covered both ways ÔÇö ACPToTranscriptTests (bare late tool_call_update after final message folds into a tool output) and RoundTripTests (scripted late-settling output).
+
+    Tests: NEW Tests/.../Bridge/ACPToTranscriptTests.swift (10: per-variant folding, accumulation, role-change flush, id correlation, straggler, plan, skip, stream drain) + Tests/.../Bridge/RoundTripTests.swift (5). Deterministic, no live model, reuses the prompt-turn TranscriptMapper + scripted entry helpers. swift build --build-tests 0 warnings/0 errors; swift test = 171 FoundationModelsACPTests (+15) + 108 ACPGenerateTests = 279 pass, 0 failures.
+
+    Note for downstream (^e2x6ra0 e2e, ^0td21b4 README): the shipped client-side utility is `TranscriptBuilder` ÔÇö fold a SessionUpdate stream (e.g. ClientSideConnection.updates(for:)) into a growing FoundationModels Transcript; it is the ┬ž7/┬ž9 inverse so an ACP client becomes another producer of the Transcript AgentViewKit renders.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-15T21:02:34.095675+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KXHBDW50GFJS4TH0HGS0D3KP
 position_column: doing
